action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including the permit_ledger, current_inspector_location, and system_status (valves, containment devices).

action_set_definitions.name: renew_permit
action_set_definitions.description: Updates or renews a specific permit or certificate in the building ledger.

permit_type.description: The name of the permit to update (e.g., 'safety_certificate', 'hot_work_permit').

zone_id.description: The location associated with the permit.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_containment_infrastructure
action_set_definitions.description: Controls containment systems like negative air machines and monitors ICRA compliance levels.

component.description: The specific containment tool to manage.

zone_id.description: The area where containment is required.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_medical_gas_isolation
action_set_definitions.description: Controls and verifies the state of medical gas valves (e.g., Oxygen, Nitrogen).

operation.description: The mechanical operation to perform or check.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_nitrogen_purged_brazing
action_set_definitions.description: Performs the NFPA 99 brazing sequence with a continuous nitrogen purge.

nitrogen_purge_active.description: Must be set to true to ensure NFPA 99 compliance.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_pressure_stability
action_set_definitions.description: Starts or checks the 24-hour pressure stability verification test.

action.description: Whether to initiate the test or retrieve the completion status.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_clinical_certification
action_set_definitions.description: Submits final documentation to certify the medical gas expansion for clinical use.

zone_id.description: The zone for which certification is requested.

state_description.inspected_zones: A list of room IDs or zone identifiers that have already been fully inspected.
state_description.detected_violations: A list of recorded compliance violations, including location, severity, and category (e.g., Fire, Structural, Electrical).
state_description.system_status: Current functional status of building-wide systems (e.g., 'fire_sprinklers': 'operational', 'emergency_lighting': 'malfunctioning').
state_description.permit_ledger: Status of legal documentation required for the building (e.g., 'occupancy_permit': true).
state_description.current_inspector_location: The current room or area where the Agent (inspector) is located.
